title: Torrent Pharmaceuticals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Torrent Pharmaceuticals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals!
